quicksight.dashboard.sectionstyle.CfnAbo: The options that style a section.

quicksight.dashboard.sectionstyle.Height.Description: The height of a section.  Heights can only be defined for header and footer sections. The default height margin is 0.5 inches.

quicksight.dashboard.sectionstyle.Paddin.Description: The spacing between section content and its top, bottom, left, and right edges.  There is no padding by default.
